test_results.expected: Confirmation or success message is displayed
test_results.actual: Step 4: The user tried to fill out and submit the input form - Expected: Confirmation or success message is displayed

test_results.expected: * The AI attestation pop-up closes                                                              * No navigation occurs, and the user remains on the same page
test_results.actual: Step 2: Click the "Disagree" button on the AI attestation pop-up. - Expected: * The AI attestation pop-up closes                                                              * No navigation occurs, and the user remains on the same page

test_results.expected: The user stays on the same page and no redirection or change in the UI happens

test_results.expected: User remains on the current page, and no further action is allowed if the AI attestation is required for proceeding.
test_results.actual: Step 4: The user tried to interact with the page after disagreeing (e.g., navigate to other parts of the application). - Expected: User remains on the current page, and no further action is allowed if the AI attestation is required for proceeding.
